sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 98:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 98:1
items.html: Since the level of ZA, which is MA and BON, comes out on the screen of phase one, and it is known that the coarseness of phase one is faint, and the coupling of light that comes out on it has no expansion below except by connecting to the bottom Hey. (Ibid.)
